page.title: Jet Ski Rental Puerto Banus | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book jet ski rental Puerto Banus from €749/2h. Ride a Sea-Doo GTX with skipper, fuel & drinks included. Reserve your session today.
data.summary: Book a jet ski rental in Puerto Banus with Boat Rental Marbella. Ride a Sea-Doo GTX 3-seater, depart from Puerto Banus, and enjoy included skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m, 3 pax, departs Puerto Banus.
Jet ski rental Puerto Banus: Tier A pricing from €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% IVA.
Ride along the Marbella coastline past Cabopino, Cala del Faro, and the Golden Mile.
No hidden costs – everything from fuel to drinks is included.
Flexible booking via WhatsApp for custom durations and group options.
Combine jet ski with a boat charter for a full day on the water.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Puerto Banus?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. Our licensed skipper accompanies every rental and handles the controls. You can ride as a passenger or, with a brief safety briefing, take the helm under the skipper's supervision.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski can carry up to 3 people. It is 3.4 metres long and designed for a comfortable ride along the Costa del Sol. Ideal for couples, small groups, or families with one child.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: The price includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no extra charges. Tier A pricing starts at €749 for 2 hours.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski depart from?
faq.a: All jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banus, Marbella. You will meet at the marina, and the skipper will guide you to the jet ski. The departure point is central and easy to reach by taxi or car.

faq.q: Can I combine a jet ski rental with a boat charter?
faq.a: Yes, you can. Many guests book a boat charter from our fleet (e.g., Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) and add a jet ski for extra fun. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a custom package.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for jet ski rentals?
faq.a: We offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure. For last-minute cancellations, please contact us via WhatsApp. We aim to be flexible, especially in case of bad weather.

faq.q: What areas can I explore on the jet ski?
faq.a: You can ride along the Marbella coastline, past Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Golden Mile. Your skipper can suggest the best routes based on sea conditions and your preferences.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski rental in Puerto Banus?
faq.a: Booking is easy. Visit our website, choose the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski, and send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date and duration. We will confirm availability and send payment details. Tier A pricing applies.

data.body_html:
Jet ski rental in Puerto Banus offers an adrenaline-fuelled way to explore the Costa del Sol. With Boat Rental Marbella, you ride a Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski, departs from Puerto Banus, and includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks. Pricing starts at €749 for 2 hours (Tier A). No hidden costs, no licence needed—just pure fun on the water.

Why Choose Jet Ski Rental Puerto Banus?

Puerto Banus is the perfect launch point for a jet ski adventure. The marina sits at the heart of Marbella's Golden Mile, giving you quick access to calm Mediterranean waters and stunning coastal views. Riding a Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3.4m, 3 pax) lets you zip past Cabopino, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés. The included skipper ensures safety and shows you the best spots. With Tier A pricing (€749/2h to €2,299/8h), you get exceptional value for a premium experience.

Our Jet Ski: Sea-Doo GTX

The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski is 3.4 metres long and seats up to 3 people. It departs from Puerto Banus and comes with a licensed skipper who handles navigation. The rental includes fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% IVA. No extras, no surprises. You can book for 2, 4, 6, or 8 hours, or contact us via WhatsApp for custom durations.

Pricing for Jet Ski Rental Puerto Banus

All jet ski rentals fall under Tier A pricing: €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours. The price covers everything—skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and tax. There are no additional fees. For longer sessions or group bookings, send us a WhatsApp message and we will tailor a package.

What to Expect on Your Jet Ski Adventure

Your rental starts at Puerto Banus marina. After a safety briefing from the skipper, you set off along the coast. You can ride at full throttle or cruise at a relaxed pace. The skipper points out landmarks like La Concha mountain, the Golden Mile villas, and the beaches of Cabopino. You can stop for a swim or a photo. All drinks and snacks are on board, so you stay refreshed. The experience is flexible—you decide the pace.

Combine Jet Ski with a Boat Charter

If you want a full day on the water, consider adding a jet ski to a boat charter. For example, book the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) and include the Sea-Doo GTX for extra excitement. This works well for groups who want both relaxation and thrill. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a custom combo.

Explore More with Boat Rental Marbella

Beyond jet ski rental, our fleet includes 19 boats, from speedboats to luxury yachts. All depart from Puerto Banus and include skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks. Check out our boat rental Marbella page for the full list. Popular choices include the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) and the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h with free jet ski). For a smaller group, the Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) is a great option. Each charter includes the same premium inclusions.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Puerto Banus?

No, you do not need a licence. Our licensed skipper accompanies every rental and handles the controls. You can ride as a passenger or, with a brief safety briefing, take the helm under the skipper's supervision.

How many people can ride on the Sea-Doo GTX?

The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski can carry up to 3 people. It is 3.4 metres long and designed for a comfortable ride along the Costa del Sol. Ideal for couples, small groups, or families with one child.

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

The price includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no extra charges. Tier A pricing starts at €749 for 2 hours.

Where does the jet ski depart from?

All jet ski rentals depart from Puerto Banus, Marbella. You will meet at the marina, and the skipper will guide you to the jet ski. The departure point is central and easy to reach by taxi or car.

Can I combine a jet ski rental with a boat charter?

Yes, you can. Many guests book a boat charter from our fleet (e.g., Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) and add a jet ski for extra fun. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a custom package.

What is the cancellation policy for jet ski rentals?

We offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure. For last-minute cancellations, please contact us via WhatsApp. We aim to be flexible, especially in case of bad weather.

What areas can I explore on the jet ski?

You can ride along the Marbella coastline, past Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the Golden Mile. Your skipper can suggest the best routes based on sea conditions and your preferences.

How do I book a jet ski rental in Puerto Banus?

Booking is easy. Visit our website, choose the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski, and send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date and duration. We will confirm availability and send payment details. Tier A pricing applies.
